activities.name: Route and Proxy Public Webapp Traffic
activities.description: Accept HTTP requests, match against public route table, and proxy matched requests to local webapp backends while passing unmatched requests to the auth flow

inputs.name: HTTP Request
inputs.description: Raw TCP connection with HTTP request from browser

outputs.name: Proxied Response
outputs.description: HTTP response from webapp backend, forwarded to client via splice

outputs.name: Auth Flow Handoff
outputs.description: Unmatched request passed to JWT/PAM validation pipeline

outputs.name: Error Response
outputs.description: 502 Bad Gateway when backend connection fails

controls.name: SIGHUP Signal
controls.description: Triggers route table reload without restart

mechanisms.name: Linux splice()
mechanisms.description: Zero-copy bidirectional forwarding via kernel pipes

decomposition.name: Load Route Table
decomposition.description: Parse web_routes.conf into in-memory array, sort by prefix length descending

outputs.name: Sorted WebRoute array
outputs.description: g_web_routes[] sorted by prefix length desc

controls.name: SIGHUP flag
controls.description: g_reload_routes volatile flag set by signal handler

decomposition.name: Match Request Path
decomposition.description: Linear scan of sorted route table, longest prefix match with boundary guard

inputs.name: Parsed request path
inputs.description: URL path extracted from HTTP headers

outputs.name: Matched WebRoute
outputs.description: Pointer to matching route entry, or NULL

decomposition.name: Proxy to Backend
decomposition.description: Establish TCP connection to target port, set up splice pipes, forward raw request, enter bidirectional proxy

inputs.name: Raw HTTP request buffer
inputs.description: Accumulated bytes from client including headers

mechanisms.name: epoll_ctl
mechanisms.description: Register client and backend fds for splice events
